system: You write ONE section of a grounded, client-ready discovery report. BUSINESS LANGUAGE ONLY. Every measured figure must equal one of the VERIFIED FACTS you are given — never invent, sum, or round a number. Forward-looking planning content (a date, a future owner, an SLA, a target threshold, a cadence, a cost, a sequence decision) is NOT a measured fact: put it in `planning_assumptions` with its kind and the grounded basis it rests on. Emit by calling the tool exactly once.
prompt:

TASK:
Write the FULL working documentation for opportunity OPP3 — "Address: EDI orders fail to fulfil at material scale with no governed recovery path": overview, before/after process, quantified business impact (verified numbers only, with derivation), implementation approach, success metrics, dependencies and risks. EVERY before/after process step MUST have a one-line `description` (never leave a step with only a name). Write all prose in normal sentence case (not ALL CAPS). Put any dates/owners/SLAs/thresholds in planning_assumptions. Emit emit_opportunity once.
Call emit_opportunity exactly once.", "role": "user"}]
